{
  "source_tables": [
    {
      "page": 46,
      "title": "Exhibit C – Part III Total Lives and Annual Salaries of All Active Participants Classified by Age and Years of Service as of December 31, 2019",
      "row_labels": ["Under 20", "20 to 24", "25 to 29", "30 to 34", "35 to 39", "40 to 44", "45 to 49", "50 to 54", "55 to 59", "60 to 63"],
      "col_labels": ["Under 1 year", "1 to 4", "5 to 9", "10 to 14", "15 to 19", "20 to 24", "25 to 29", "30 to 34", "35 and over"],
      "cells": [
        [null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null],
        [168, 342, null, null, null, null, null, null, null],
        [151, 1345, 48, null, null, null, null, null, null],
        [86, 980, 515, 8, null, null, null, null, null],
        [48, 458, 528, 731, 181, null, null, null, null],
        [7, 134, 233, 513, 976, 191, null, null, null],
        [null, 2, 71, 263, 643, 1211, 187, null, null],
        [null, 2, 104, 355, 809, 914, 36, null, null],
        [null, null, 1, 123, 297, 346, 99, 1, null],
        [null, null, null, 22, 81, 87, 47, 9, null]
      ]
    }
  ],
  "row_map": [
    {"target": "<25", "sources": ["Under 20", "20 to 24"], "op": "sum", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "29", "sources": ["25 to 29"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "34", "sources": ["30 to 34"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "39", "sources": ["35 to 39"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "44", "sources": ["40 to 44"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "49", "sources": ["45 to 49"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "54", "sources": ["50 to 54"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "59", "sources": ["55 to 59"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "64", "sources": ["60 to 63"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "70", "sources": [], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null}
  ],
  "col_map": [
    {"target": "4", "sources": ["Under 1 year", "1 to 4"], "op": "sum"},
    {"target": "9", "sources": ["5 to 9"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "14", "sources": ["10 to 14"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "19", "sources": ["15 to 19"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "24", "sources": ["20 to 24"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "29", "sources": ["25 to 29"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "34", "sources": ["30 to 34"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "40", "sources": ["35 and over"], "op": "copy"}
  ],
  "notes": "Used Exhibit C – Part III (All Active Participants) on page 35 (labeled page 46 in PDF sequence), which is the combined male+female age/service distribution. Transcribed only the count (No.) rows, excluding the salary rows and the Total row/column. Source age bins top out at '60 to 63' with no bin for age 65 and over, so target row '70' has no source data (empty). Source col 'Under 1 year' and '1 to 4' are summed into target '4' (0-4). The source '35 and over' column maps to target '40' (35-40) directly as a copy since there is no separate 30-34 vs 35+ split issue; source '30 to 34' maps to target '34'."
}
